title: Medical Assistant
description: Syneos Health is seeking a Medical Assistant to support clinical research operations in Chicago. You'll assist with patient examinations, vital sign collection, and study documentation. Work onsite for a leading biopharmaceutical services company advancing patient care through innovative clinical research.
responsibilities: Take and record vital signs (blood pressure, temperature, pulse, respiration)
Prepare examination rooms and equipment for patient visits
Assist with patient examinations and procedures under supervision
Collect blood samples and other specimens according to protocol
Maintain accurate patient records and study documentation

requirements.education: High school diploma or GED; medical assistant certificate preferred
skills: Ability to follow clinical protocols precisely
